activityTitle: M ETHOD   OF   C ONSTRUCTION 1. Take two pieces of plywood 10 cm × 20 cm and join them with the help of
objective:
To find the distance of given point (in
space) from a plane (passing through
three non-collinear points) by actual
measurement and also analytically.
One cardboard of size 20 cm × 30
cm and another of size 10 cm × 15
cm., a thick sheet of paper of size
20 cm × 30 cm, nails of varying
lengths with caps on one end,
geometry box, wires.
observation:
1. P 1   represents the _________.
2. P 2   represents the _________.
3.   l 1   represents the _________.
4.   l 2   represents the _________.
5.   l 3   is the line of intersection   _________.
6.   l 4   is the line of intersection   _________.
7. Angle between   l 1   and   l 2   is equal to   _________.
discussion: This model can also be used to find the angle between a line and a plane.
